_publications._publicationTitle: Identification of hair shaft progenitors that create a niche for hair pigmentation.

_contextSnippet: DCT immunostaining revealed a significant loss of DCT+ differentiated mature melanocytes in the Scf flox/gfp; Krox20Cre mouse HF at P10 (P < 0.05) and P11 (P < 0.0001)
details: Successfully detected significant loss of DCT+ differentiated mature melanocytes in Scf knockout mouse HF at P10 (P < 0.05) and P11 (P < 0.0001)
